title: filago minima var. supina
intro: Filago minima var. supina, also known as the lesser cress or rockrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Filago minima var. supina include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or topical cream, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
